questionHtml: Apart from the ribosomes, explain the evidence for the endosymbiotic theory of the origin of eukaryotic cells.
markschemeHtml:
a. mitochondria/chloroplasts show features in common with prokaryotes/similar size;

b. multiply by binary fission/in same manner;

c. have naked loop of DNA/circular DNA/own DNA;

d. surrounded by a double membrane;

meta.title: Apart from the ribosomes, explain the evidence for the endosymbiotic theory of the origin of eukaryotic cells.
breadcrumbLabels: A2.2.12. Origin of eukaryotic cells by endosymbiosis
